hero_subtitle: SFTY connects and consolidates KYC data from multiple providers into one actionable compliance workflow to enhance onboarding, ongoing monitoring, case management and audit readiness.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: KYC data silos slow compliance workflows
problem_description: Disconnected KYC provider outputs create gaps across onboarding, monitoring and case management. This fragmentation drives manual effort, weakens audit trails and complicates compliance review for digital asset operations teams.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates outputs from multiple KYC providers into a single operational workflow that links onboarding, ongoing monitoring, case management and audit evidence for VASP compliance teams.
workflow_title: From fragmented KYC data to decisions
workflow_description: SFTY consolidates fragmented KYC provider outputs, routes reviews through risk-based workflows and captures decisions with audit evidence for compliance operations.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond KYC data silos. One compliance layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects fragmented KYC outputs into unified workflows, cases, decisions and audit evidence to streamline onboarding and continuous compliance for digital asset businesses.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing fragmented KYC data by preserving audit-ready evidence and enabling secure enterprise deployment with governance from day one.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY connect KYC data across onboarding and monitoring
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how KYC data integrates into compliance case workflows
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports KYC review processes
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe provider orchestration models for multi-vendor KYC data
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance operations?
faq_1_answer: SFTY acts as a compliance control layer connecting fragmented KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, screening and case data into one operational workflow for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY connect fragmented KYC data?
faq_2_answer: SFTY aggregates KYC provider outputs, linking identity checks with onboarding, monitoring, workflows and cases to create a connected, auditable compliance process without manual handoffs.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case histories and associated provider outputs as audit-ready evidence to support regulatory and bank due diligence reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects existing KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers through configurable APIs and workflows without requiring replacement of current systems.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC and screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace providers but structures their outputs into consistent compliance workflows, evidence packages and reporting layers above existing vendor tools.
final_title: Connect KYC data into connected compliance workflows
final_description: Review how SFTY consolidates KYC outputs into structured onboarding, monitoring, case management, and audit-ready evidence for VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
footer_contact_title: For supervisory, compliance and deployment discussions.
footer_legal_notice: This page is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, regulatory or compliance advice. SFTY deployment depends on jurisdiction, client requirements and applicable laws.
